title: Sort columns in mobile app
excerpt: I would like to be able to sort by column in the mobile app and have it stick. Same features as on the desktop.

posts.author: thebrochproject (Robin Herrick)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like to be able to sort by column in the mobile app and have it stick. Same features as on the desktop.

posts.author: ManicMondayUser (John Mc)
posts.cookedHtml: Either I’m losing the plot, or this still can’t be done on iOS

posts.author: garan.k_phytech (Garan Keeler)
posts.cookedHtml: Please vote for this feature request! How are there not more votes for this request? On the mobile app I know you can sort by most columns EXCEPT the Name / Primary column, which is ridiculous by the way.
